title: Test: Add security testing
original_text: Added security testing with OWASP ZAP. Implemented security scans for vulnerabilities. Added security tests for authentication flows. Implemented security tests for input validation. Added security test reporting. Result: no critical vulnerabilities found.
expected_subject: test(security): add security testing with OWASP ZAP
expected_body_lines: - Add security tests for authentication flows
- Implement security tests for input validation
expected_command: git commit -m "test(security): add security testing with OWASP ZAP"
